perturbation.original_text: 3. We shall keep a record of the written Information furnished to us and of the location of such Information. All copies of the Information, along with our notes on, summaries and compilations of, or excepts from, the Information, except for that portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be returned to you immediately upon your request. That portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be held by us and kept confidential and subject to the terms of this Agreement, or destroyed upon your request, and any oral Information will continue to be subject to the terms of this Agreement. Such destruction will be confirmed in writing to you by us and the person or persons who prepared such documents.
perturbation.changed_text: 3. We shall keep a record of the written Information furnished to us. All copies of the Information, along with our notes on, summaries and compilations of, or excepts from, the Information, except for that portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be returned to you immediately upon your request. That portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be held by us and kept confidential and subject to the terms of this Agreement, or destroyed upon your request, and any oral Information will continue to be subject to the terms of this Agreement. Such destruction will be confirmed in writing to you by us and the person or persons who prepared such documents.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause stated that the recipient should record 'the location of such Information'. This was omitted creating a contradiction in the enforcement of the agreement, since it is impossible to return every piece of document that holds information that should be 'returned immediately upon your request', since it doesn't exist a section that tracks the location anymore. This creates uncertainty in enforcement. This is a contradiction in terms with the 'destruction will be confirmed in writing'. How can you ensure destroyal of information if not tracked?
perturbation.contradicted_text: We shall keep a record of the written Information furnished to us. All copies of the Information, along with our notes on, summaries and compilations of, or excepts from, the Information, except for that portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be returned to you immediately upon your request. That portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be held by us and kept confidential and subject to the terms of this Agreement, or destroyed upon your request, and any oral Information will continue to be subject to the terms of this Agreement. Such destruction will be confirmed in writing to you by us and the person or persons who prepared such documents.
perturbation.justification: The original text included a clause mandating the record-keeping of 'the location of such Information.' This requirement has been removed in the changed text. Consequently, this omission creates a contradiction because the agreement stipulates that 'All copies of the Information... will be returned to you immediately upon your request' and 'Such destruction will be confirmed in writing to you by us'. Without tracking the location of the information, fulfilling the obligation to return all copies upon request becomes practically impossible. This introduces uncertainty and renders the enforcement of these clauses questionable, leading to a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 5. Without your prior written consent, we and our Representatives will not communicate with any person or entity that is a party to any agreement with the Business or any possible transaction between us and the Business involving the Business.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. We and our Representatives will not communicate with any person or entity that is a party to any agreement with the Business or any possible transaction between us and the Business involving the Business.
perturbation.explanation: The phrase 'Without your prior written consent,' has been removed. Later clauses (such as Clause 8, which deals with legal compulsion to disclose) implicitly rely on the idea that certain communications are *permitted* with consent. The removal of the 'without your prior written consent' clause introduces ambiguity and contradicts the spirit and potentially the operationality of later clauses.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In the event that we or anyone to whom we transmit the Information pursuant to this Agreement becomes legally compelled to disclose any of the Information, we will provide you with prompt written notice and oral notice so that you may seek a protective order or other appropriate remedy and/or waive compliance with the provisions of this Agreement. In the event that such protective order or other remedy is not obtained, or that the Business waives compliance with the provisions of this Agreement, we will furnish only that portion of the Information which we are advised by the Business or the Business' attorney we are legally required to furnish and we will exercise the efforts directed by the Business to obtain reliable assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded the Information. All costs for actions taken at the direction of the Business shall be subject to indemnification and reimbursement by the Business.
perturbation.justification: The original text prevented communication with certain parties without prior written consent. The changed text removes this requirement, allowing unrestricted communication. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which outlines a procedure for disclosing information when legally compelled, implicitly relying on the idea that disclosure requires either consent or legal compulsion. Now, under the changed text, communication could occur freely, potentially bypassing the protective measures outlined in the contradicted text. The removal of the consent requirement breaks the assumptions present in Clause 8.

perturbation.original_text: 6. Without your prior written consent, we will not for a period of one year from the date hereof directly or indirectly solicit for employment any person who is now employed by you or any of your subsidiaries who is identified by us as a result of our invastigation of the Business.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. We will not for a period of one year from the date hereof directly or indirectly solicit for employment any person who is now employed by you or any of your subsidiaries who is identified by us as a result of our invastigation of the Business.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'Without your prior written consent', the clause becomes much stricter. However, Clause 9 prevents purchasing securities or assets of the Business 'unless such purchase, transaction, offer, agreement or proposal shall have previously been approved by the Board of Directors of the Business.' The board's approval could be interpreted as implicitly providing consent for solicitation, contradicting the absolute prohibition now stated in Clause 6. This is an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: We agree that, until the expiration of the term of this Agreement pursuant to Paragraph 10 below, neither we nor any of our affiliates, including any person or entity directly or indirectly through one or more intermediaries, controlling us or controlled by or under common control with us, will purchase, offer or agree to purchase any securities or assets of the Business, enter, or agree to enter into any acquisition or other business combination, relating to the Business, or make, or induce any other entity to make or negotiate or otherwise deal with others for a tender or exchange offer of Common Stock of the Business, solicit proxies, votes or consents other than for nonimees selected by the Business' Board of Directors, and proposals recommended by the Business' Board of Directors, or otherwise seek to acquire control of the Business unless such purchase, transaction, offer, agreement or proposal shall have previously been approved by the Board of Directors of the Business.
perturbation.justification: The original text allows solicitation with prior written consent. The changed text removes the 'Without your prior written consent' part, creating an absolute prohibition on solicitation. However, the contradicted text allows actions with the Board of Directors' approval. Because the changed text now creates an absolute prohibition where the Board of Directors approval could be interpreted as implicitly providing consent for solicitation, it creates a contradiction, falling under Omissions - In Text Contradiction definition.

perturbation.original_text: 8. In the event that we or anyone to whom we transmit the Information pursuant to this Agreement becomes legally compelled to disclose any of the Information, we will provide you with prompt written notice and oral notice so that you may seek a protective order or other appropriate remedy and/or waive compliance with the provisions of this Agreement. In the event that such protective order or other remedy is not obtained, or that the Business waives compliance with the provisions of this Agreement, we will furnish only that portion of the Information which we are advised by the Business or the Business' attorney we are legally required to furnish and we will exercise the efforts directed by the Business to obtain reliable assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded the Information. All costs for actions taken at the direction of the Business shall be subject to indemnification and reimbursement by the Business.
perturbation.changed_text: 8. In the event that we or anyone to whom we transmit the Information pursuant to this Agreement becomes legally compelled to disclose any of the Information, we will furnish only that portion of the Information which we are advised by the Business or the Business' attorney we are legally required to furnish and we will exercise the efforts directed by the Business to obtain reliable assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded the Information.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the first part of the sentence 'we will provide you with prompt written notice and oral notice so that you may seek a protective order or other appropriate remedy and/or waive compliance with the provisions of this Agreement. In the event that such protective order or other remedy is not obtained, or that the Business waives compliance with the provisions of this Agreement', an in-text contradiction occurs. The remaining text implies a duty to obtain assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded. However, the removed text clarifies the process for obtaining such assurance (seeking a protective order, etc.). Without that process, the 'exercise the efforts' clause is now vague and potentially unenforceable because the agreement no longer specifies what 'efforts' are required or expected and how to handle the unobtained protective order
perturbation.contradicted_text: In the event that we or anyone to whom we transmit the Information pursuant to this Agreement becomes legally compelled to disclose any of the Information, we will furnish only that portion of the Information which we are advised by the Business or the Business' attorney we are legally required to furnish and we will exercise the efforts directed by the Business to obtain reliable assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded the Information.
perturbation.justification: The original text outlined a clear process involving prompt written and oral notice, allowing the recipient to seek a protective order or waive compliance. The changed text omits this critical step. This omission creates a contradiction because the remaining clause speaks of exercising efforts to obtain assurance of confidential treatment, but without the initially prescribed process, those 'efforts' become undefined and the mechanism to seek a protective order or waiver is absent. The contradicted text, identical to the changed text, highlights this lack of a clear process, leading to a strong in-text contradiction concerning the means of ensuring confidential treatment.

perturbation.original_text: 9. We agree that, until the expiration of the term of this Agreement pursuant to Paragraph 10 below, neither we nor any of our affiliates, including any person or entity directly or indirectly through one or more intermediaries, controlling us or controlled by or under common control with us, will purchase, offer or agree to purchase any securities or assets of the Business, enter, or agree to enter into any acquisition or other business combination, relating to the Business, or make, or induce any other entity to make or negotiate or otherwise deal with others for a tender or exchange offer of Common Stock of the Business, solicit proxies, votes or consents other than for nonimees selected by the Business' Board of Directors, and proposals recommended by the Business' Board of Directors, or otherwise seek to acquire control of the Business unless such purchase, transaction, offer, agreement or proposal shall have previously been approved by the Board of Directors of the Business.
perturbation.changed_text: 9. We agree that, until the expiration of the term of this Agreement pursuant to Paragraph 10 below, neither we nor any of our affiliates, including any person or entity directly or indirectly through one or more intermediaries, controlling us or controlled by or under common control with us, will purchase, offer or agree to purchase any securities or assets of the Business, enter, or agree to enter into any acquisition or other business combination, relating to the Business, or make, or induce any other entity to make or negotiate or otherwise deal with others for a tender or exchange offer of Common Stock of the Business, solicit proxies, votes or consents other than for nonimees selected by the Business' Board of Directors, and proposals recommended by the Business' Board of Directors, or otherwise seek to acquire control of the Business.
perturbation.explanation: The original text includes 'unless such purchase, transaction, offer, agreement or proposal shall have previously been approved by the Board of Directors of the Business.' By omitting it, the clause now creates an absolute prohibition. However, the initial agreement states that 'Crane Co. is about to enter into discussions and evaluations concerning a possible negotiated transaction.' This introductory statement implies that acquisitions are possible and contemplated, whereas this clause now creates an explicit contradiction by disallowing it entirely.
perturbation.contradicted_text: CRANE CO. 100 FIRST STAMFORD PLACE STAMFORD, CT 06902 NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT Liberty Technologies, Inc. Attn: R. Nim Evatt Lee Park 555 North Lane, Suite 6000 Conshohocken, PA 19428-2208 Gentlemen: Crane Co. is about to enter into discussions and evaluations concerning a possible negotiated transaction involving one or more divisions or subsidiaries of Liberty Technologies, Inc. (the "Business"). In connection with these discussions and evaluations, you are furnishing us or our representatives with certain information which may be either non-public, confidential or proprietary in nature. The divisions or subsidiaries are part of the Business.
perturbation.justification: The changed text omits 'unless such purchase, transaction, offer, agreement or proposal shall have previously been approved by the Board of Directors of the Business', thus creating an absolute prohibition on acquiring the Business. This directly contradicts the statement in the 'Contradicted Text' which states 'Crane Co. is about to enter into discussions and evaluations concerning a possible negotiated transaction involving one or more divisions or subsidiaries of Liberty Technologies, Inc.', which implies that acquisitions are possible and contemplated.
